tools.name: parse_pdf_with_mineru
tools.description: Parse an uploaded PDF standard document via MinerU into Markdown, images, JSON sidecars, and a manifest under /workspace/output/mineru.

tools.name: extract_standard_metadata
tools.description: Extract standard metadata fields from Markdown using a LangGraph metadata extraction subgraph.

tools.name: validate_output_schema
tools.description: Validate structured outputs against supported Pydantic schemas.

tools.name: propose_memory_update
tools.description: Create a human-reviewable memory update proposal without writing memory directly.
